overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a wizarding school library interior from a video game, featuring students in dark robes studying at wooden tables surrounded by towering bookshelves, green banker's lamps, and a large decorative tapestry.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand wizarding library interior with warm ambient lighting. Students in dark robes sit quietly at wooden tables studying, surrounded by towering bookshelves. A large blue tapestry hangs on the far wall, while green banker's lamps provide localized lighting on the tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand wizarding library that maintains a mood of quiet, scholarly intensity. It begins with a wide perspective of the interior, where warm ambient lighting washes over the vast space. The focus settles on students in dark robes sitting quietly at wooden tables, their study areas illuminated by the localized glow of green banker's lamps. This intimate lighting contrasts with the towering bookshelves that flank the room, before the gaze extends toward the far wall where a large blue tapestry hangs as a decorative centerpiece.
